Build TCP tibble from adjacency matrix

Source: R/pairwise.R
pairwise_build_tcp.Rd

Converts the raw N×N adjacency matrix from prefio::adjacency() into a tidy tibble with one row per unordered pair {A, B}.

Usage

pairwise_build_tcp(adj)

Arguments

adj

N×N integer matrix from prefio::adjacency().

Value

A tibble with columns item_a, item_b, wins_a, wins_b, total, tcp_a, tcp_b, h2h_winner.

Details

Matrix indexing note: prefio::wide_preferences() treats ranking values as descending (higher value = more preferred), which reverses the usual adjacency convention. As a result adj[a, b] counts b's wins over a, so wins_a is read from adj[b, a].

On this page

Developed by Linh Ngo, Dianne Cook, Damjan Vukcevic.
